sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, date_value DateTime);
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, date_value) VALUES (1, toDateTime('2021-04-14 11:22:33'));
SELECT id, monthName(date_value) AS month FROM test_dates;
UPDATE test_dates SET date_value = toDateTime('2021-07-20 15:45:00') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, monthName(date_value) AS month FROM test_dates WHERE date_value < toDateTime('2022-01-01 00:00:00');
